executiveSummaryContext.weatherEvent: Central Florida Severe Storm and Tornado Risk
topConcerns: Orlando, Space Coast are the main affected markets at this timeline point.
Highest-risk properties: Orlando Lakeside Villas (Critical, 81); Kissimmee Palms SFR Pool (Medium, 60); Melbourne Coast Townhomes (Medium, 52).
Roof Inspection, Exterior Envelope, HVAC Exterior Unit, Tree and Debris are the main post-storm work order themes.
recommendedNextActions: Send resident notifications for affected properties.
Pre-book contractors for Critical and High risk assets.
Prepare draft inspection work orders for user confirmation after storm clearance.
